careers.title: Full Stack Web Developer
careers.description: Build complete web applications from frontend to backend, create responsive websites, and deploy scalable solutions.

sixMonths.title: HTML, CSS & JavaScript Basics
sixMonths.description: Master the fundamentals of web development

sixMonths.title: Advanced JavaScript & Git
sixMonths.description: Learn modern JavaScript and version control

sixMonths.title: Database & Full Stack Integration
sixMonths.description: Connect frontend to backend with databases

sixMonths.title: Portfolio Projects & Deployment
sixMonths.description: Build 3-4 full stack projects and deploy them

oneYear.title: Advanced React & State Management
oneYear.description: Learn complex state management and optimization

oneYear.title: TypeScript & Modern Tools
oneYear.description: Add type safety and modern development tools

twoYears.title: Cloud & DevOps
twoYears.description: Master cloud deployment and DevOps practices

pros: Can start with just a laptop and internet

careers.title: Data Analyst
careers.description: Analyze data to help businesses make informed decisions using Excel, SQL, Python, and visualization tools.
certifications: Google Data Analytics Certificate (Free with Financial Aid)

sixMonths.title: Excel Mastery
sixMonths.description: Learn advanced Excel for data analysis

sixMonths.title: Python for Data Analysis
sixMonths.description: Use Python libraries for data work

pros: Clear career progression to Data Science
Mix of technical and business skills
cons: Need strong communication to explain findings

careers.title: Digital Marketing Specialist
careers.description: Help businesses grow online through SEO, social media, content marketing, and paid advertising campaigns.

careers.title: UI/UX Designer
careers.description: Design user-friendly interfaces and experiences for websites and apps, making products intuitive and beautiful.
certifications: Google UX Design Certificate (Free with Aid)
cons: Need to balance aesthetics and functionality

careers.title: Content Writer / Copywriter
careers.description: Create engaging content for websites, blogs, social media, and marketing materials to help businesses communicate effectively.

sixMonths.title: SEO & Web Writing
sixMonths.description: Learn to write for search engines

quizQuestions.question: What excites you the most?
quizQuestions.description: Choose the area that naturally interests you

quizQuestions.question: What kind of work do you enjoy?
How do you prefer to learn new things?
Which activity sounds most appealing for your daily work?
What skills do you already have?
quizQuestions.description: Select all that apply (even basic level)

quizQuestions.question: How comfortable are you with technology?

options.label: Very comfortable - I love learning new tools

quizQuestions.question: Are you willing to spend 3-6 months learning new skills?

options.label: Yes, I can dedicate 6-8 hours daily

quizQuestions.question: Do you have any work experience?
How would you rate your English proficiency?

options.label: Excellent - I can write and speak fluently

quizQuestions.question: What is your preferred work location?
What is your expected starting salary? (Annual in INR)
When do you want to start earning?

options.label: I can take 1+ year to prepare

quizQuestions.question: Do you have reliable internet access?
Can you invest in paid courses if needed?

options.label: Yes, I can invest in learning
